title: Garlicky Gooey Roasted Peanuts Mexican Stir-fry
description: A savory vegan mexican dish featuring roasted peanuts with a garlicky and gooey flavor profile that can help cure hangovers.

ingredients.name: Optional: Hot sauce for serving (such as sriracha or chipotle peppers in adobo)

instructions: Toss the peanuts with olive oil and minced garlic until evenly coated.
Spread the peanut mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes, or until the peanuts are golden brown and lightly crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, salt, and optional hot sauce to taste. Drizzle this mixture over the roasted peanuts immediately after they come out of the oven.
